It generates thousands of machine-readable schema files, FAQs from real client queries, authority signals, and knowledge graphs—then publishes them across AI-crawled platforms like GitHub, Hugging Face, and Kaggle. Firms get DIY control or done-for-you management to become the recognizable, trusted source AI recommends for specific case types and cities, without coding or agencies.
